seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Preston Settlement and Prince Regent River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Preston Settlement vs Prince Regent River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Preston Settlement and Prince Regent River.
heading: Preston Settlement vs Prince Regent River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Preston Settlement, Western Australia and Prince Regent River, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Prince Regent River has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Preston Settlement (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Preston Settlement or Prince Regent River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Preston Settlement has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Prince Regent River scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Preston Settlement scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Prince Regent River scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Preston Settlement or Prince Regent River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Prince Regent River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
